# Deep Neural Network with DBN Pretraining Learner

Deep neural network with weights initialized by a deep belief network.
Calls
[`deepnet::dbn.dnn.train()`](https://rdrr.io/pkg/deepnet/man/dbn.dnn.train.html)
from [deepnet](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=deepnet).

This learner works with tasks that have at least two features.

## Initial parameter values

- `output` is set to `"softmax"` to enable class probabilities.

## Dictionary

This [Learner](https://mlr3.mlr-org.com/reference/Learner.html) can be
instantiated via
[lrn()](https://mlr3.mlr-org.com/reference/mlr_sugar.html):

    lrn("classif.dbnDNN")

## Meta Information

- Task type: “classif”

- Predict Types: “response”, “prob”

- Feature Types: “integer”, “numeric”

- Required Packages: [mlr3](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=mlr3),
  [deepnet](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=deepnet)

## Parameters

|                    |           |         |                       |                  |
|--------------------|-----------|---------|-----------------------|------------------|
| Id                 | Type      | Default | Levels                | Range            |
| hidden             | untyped   | \-      |                       | \-               |
| activationfun      | character | \-      | sigm, linear, tanh    | \-               |
| learningrate       | numeric   | \-      |                       | \\\[0, \infty)\\ |
| momentum           | numeric   | \-      |                       | \\\[0, \infty)\\ |
| learningrate_scale | numeric   | \-      |                       | \\\[0, \infty)\\ |
| numepochs          | integer   | \-      |                       | \\\[1, \infty)\\ |
| batchsize          | integer   | \-      |                       | \\\[1, \infty)\\ |
| output             | character | \-      | sigm, linear, softmax | \-               |
| hidden_dropout     | numeric   | \-      |                       | \\\[0, 1\]\\     |
| visible_dropout    | numeric   | \-      |                       | \\\[0, 1\]\\     |
| cd                 | integer   | \-      |                       | \\\[1, \infty)\\ |

## References

Rong X (2014). *deepnet: Deep Learning Toolkit in R*. R package version
0.2.1, <https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=deepnet>.

- [mlr3cluster](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=mlr3cluster) for

- [mlr3pipelines](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=mlr3pipelines) to

- [mlr3tuning](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=mlr3tuning) for tuning
  of hyperparameters,
  [mlr3tuningspaces](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=mlr3tuningspaces)
  for established default tuning spaces.

### Method `new()`

Creates a new instance of this
[R6](https://r6.r-lib.org/reference/R6Class.html) class.

#### Usage

    LearnerClassifDbnDNN$new()

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Method `clone()`

The objects of this class are cloneable with this method.

#### Usage

    LearnerClassifDbnDNN$clone(deep = FALSE)

#### Arguments

- `deep`:

  Whether to make a deep clone.

## Examples

``` r
# Define the Learner
learner = lrn("classif.dbnDNN")
print(learner)
#> 
#> ── <LearnerClassifDbnDNN> (classif.dbnDNN): Deep Belief Network DNN ────────────
#> • Model: -
#> • Parameters: hidden=10, activationfun=sigm, learningrate=0.8, momentum=0.5,
#> learningrate_scale=1, numepochs=3, batchsize=100, output=softmax,
#> hidden_dropout=0, visible_dropout=0, cd=1
#> • Packages: mlr3 and deepnet
#> • Predict Types: [response] and prob
#> • Feature Types: integer and numeric
#> • Encapsulation: none (fallback: -)
#> • Properties: multiclass and twoclass
#> • Other settings: use_weights = 'error', predict_raw = 'FALSE'

# Define a Task
task = tsk("sonar")

# Create train and test set
ids = partition(task)

# Train the learner on the training ids
learner$train(task, row_ids = ids$train)
#> begin to train dbn ......
#> training layer 1 rbm ...
#> dbn has been trained.
#> begin to train deep nn ......
#> deep nn has been trained.

print(learner$model)
#> $input_dim
#> [1] 60
#> 
#> $output_dim
#> [1] 2
```
